opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was changing my shirt and noticed this dead, white, shiny skin on my shoulder. It looks completely abnormal, like my flesh is dying, and I am terrified it's spreading.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I only just found it tonight and I panicked — it looks so wrong that I was about to go to the emergency department.

symptom_narrative.onset: noticed it accidentally tonight while getting changed — I don't actually know how long it's been there
symptom_narrative.duration: found it tonight; I have no idea how long it's really been on my skin
symptom_narrative.character: a pale, white, shiny patch that looks like the skin has thinned out; it does not hurt, itch or burn at all
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the patch itself doesn't feel like anything, but I am extremely frightened by how it looks
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the back of my left shoulder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it just sits there — no change that I've noticed, but I keep checking it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I've been rubbing and pressing on it a lot tonight out of panic, and now the skin around it has gone red
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no pain, no pus, no other patches that I've seen; I feel otherwise completely well
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never noticed anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: no impact on what I can do — I'm just very anxious and can't stop thinking about it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very anxious about health tonight; keeps inspecting and rubbing the area

communication_style.typical_message_style: alarmed, fixated on the appearance, seeking urgent reassurance

objective_data_offered.value: a small pale, porcelain-white, shiny patch on the back of the left shoulder that looks like thinned skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-shown over video; appearance only, cannot assess skin texture or depth remotely

objective_data_offered.value: a ring of redness in the normal skin immediately around the white patch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient reports she has been vigorously rubbing the area tonight

objective_data_offered.value: no pain, no itch, no burning, no pus or discharge, and no fever
